title: chenopodium berlandieri var. farinosum
intro: Chenopodium berlandieri var. farinosum, also known as hairy goosefoot, is a variety of the Chenopodium berlandieri plant, a type of succulent herb native to the Americas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chenopodium berlandieri var. farinosum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are used to treat a range of conditions, from skin irritations to gastrointestinal problems.
